name: door-slams-senna
prompt: Wide shot. Storage room door slamming open — light flooding in. Red-haired woman standing in threshold, blazing with heat-haze corona around her, green eyes seeing everything. Dark-haired man and silver-haired woman CENTER of room, caught — his hands on her face, close together. Ice crystals scattered on floor. Two caught. One furious. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting, high contrast, MAPPA studio style

sfx.description: metal door slamming open violently, sharp impact echoing in concrete room
